description: Custom analyzer for extracting insurance quote fields from PDF, Excel, and Word documents

CarrierName.description: Insurance carrier or company name (e.g., Travelers, AIG, Zurich, Chubb, CNA, Hartford, Liberty Mutual)

QuoteNumber.description: Quote number, policy number, or reference number

QuoteDate.description: Date the quote was issued or generated

EffectiveDate.description: Policy effective date, start date, or inception date

ExpiryDate.description: Policy expiration date, end date, or renewal date

BuildingLimit.description: Building coverage limit, property limit, or building value in dollars

ValuationBasis.description: Valuation basis: Replacement Cost (RC), Actual Cash Value (ACV), or Agreed Value

CoverageForm.description: Coverage form type: Special, Broad, or Basic perils

BPPLimit.description: Business Personal Property limit or contents coverage limit in dollars

BusinessInterruptionLimit.description: Business interruption limit, business income limit, or loss of income limit in dollars

BIPeriodMonths.description: Business interruption indemnity period or restoration period in months

GLPerOccurrence.description: General liability per occurrence limit or each occurrence limit in dollars

GLAggregate.description: General liability aggregate limit or general aggregate in dollars

AOPDeductible.description: All Other Perils deductible or standard property deductible in dollars

WindHailDeductiblePct.description: Wind/hail deductible percentage, windstorm deductible, or named storm deductible as a percentage

EquipmentBreakdown.description: Equipment breakdown coverage: Included, Excluded, or the coverage limit amount

OrdinanceOrLaw.description: Ordinance or law coverage, building code coverage: Included, Excluded, or the coverage limit amount

AnnualPremium.description: Total annual premium, total premium, or quoted premium amount in dollars

UnderwritingNotes.description: Underwriting notes, conditions, special terms, remarks, or exclusions
